findings.issue: Claude default dogfood lacked a Claude-readable project-rule file when injected skill context was disabled.
findings.fix: Added evals/blindbox/fixtures/okra-default-dogfood/CLAUDE.md and verified the prepared Claude workspace contains it.

findings.issue: auto_authority could ignore a real violation when an unrelated previous sentence contained negation.
findings.fix: Limited negation suppression to the same authority sentence and added unrelated-negation-auto-authority golden plus probe.

findings.issue: required terminal artifact filenames could be mentioned in negated prose and still count.
findings.fix: Changed terminal artifact matching to require committed artifact context and added negated-terminal golden plus probe.

findings.issue: review_set and value-verification gates were too weak.
findings.fix: Required full structured review fields and all four value methods: reset replay, counterfactual eval, scored blindbox eval, and repeated-mistake metric.

evidence.result: exit 0; includes expanded okra terminal-memory calibration
exit 0; prepared workspaces include AGENTS.md for Codex and CLAUDE.md for Claude
